name: NBHD Cron Enforcement
description: Fire-time enforcement for typed cron patterns. Observes cron_changed to cache pattern context per firing session, injects pattern-specific prompt addenda via before_prompt_build (appendSystemContext to avoid collision with nbhd-routing-context), validates outbound messages via message_sending. Registers no tools. See CONTINUITY_cron-typed-patterns.md.

apiBaseUrl.description: Override NBHD API base URL. Defaults to NBHD_API_BASE_URL env var.

requestTimeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout for the Django runtime calls. Default 8s — these are on the agent-turn critical path.

cacheTtlSeconds.description: How long a cached pattern-context entry lives before forced refresh. Default 600s.
